title: Create more crushed ores
description: Datapack that modifies the original recipes for Create's crushed ores, making them more worthwhile to process.
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/views/UCt7ogppIpcAeXy_PSZi77-g?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mizuno16craft-productive-bees)[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/306155360589447178?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&link=https://discord.gg/QKKUV2SBqc)](https://discord.gg/wqw5zCE) _(Spanish server/Servidor Español)_

Another datapack from my server, just in case someone else wants to use it.

I wanted to make it more worthwhile to process raw ores with Create, with the idea of ​​it being like those mods where you process ores to get more.

1 raw ore -> crushed ore -> 1-100% / 1-75% / 1-25%
![raw iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t4fXdGWK/images/383f39ea9dac1db0550b7cd9d15a8b7005e02cd2.png)

1 iron ore -> crushed ore -> 2-100% / 2-75% / 2-25% (As if it were mined with fortune I )
![iron ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t4fXdGWK/images/0f4a4e29342525156d8e0948655f60a4c87b4b65.jpeg)

~~Possible future changes:~~
- ~~Change the stone and deepslate ore variants so they don't give crushed ore but raw ore, so you can process it again.~~
- ~~In relation to the change above, perhaps doubling the loot so you can get the crusher this way would be another way to use "fortune."~~

The crushed ores available are the ones currently available in Create:
- Aluminium
- Copper
- Gold
- Iron
- Lead
- Nickel
- Osmium
- Platinum
- Quicksilver
- Silver
- Tin
- Uranium
- Zinc
